_description: AH-gate expected architectural-invariant counters (Stage 1, Fmax-independent). Captured from azurelily/IMC/test.py --model attention --seq_length 128 --head_dim 64 with the per-call counter side-channel landed in fpga_fabric.py / imc_core.py / scheduler.py. Counter contract: counters report physical fire events summed across all parallel hardware (W=16 DIMM lanes, 6 NL-DPE FC DPEs / 192 AL FC dsp_macs), per the run_checks Bug-3 fix. Schema: per-stage dict of {dpe_fire_count, pass_count, row_count, lane_count, softmax_exp_fires?, softmax_norm_fires?}.

tolerance._note: Counter equality is integer. Per-stage FSM-edge probes may be ±1 due to whether a pulse lands on the boundary cycle; anything > 1 must be in known_count_deltas.json with file:line citation.

params._helper_fires_mac_sv_ws_log: 2048 (1 fire per Q-row per W lane)

linear_qkv._note: 3 arms × 2 ping-pong DPEs each = 6 DPEs. Per arm, 128 tokens → 128 DPE fires (alternating between dpe_a and dpe_b ping-pong). Sim's run_gemm gives 128 fires per arm × 3 arms = 384 (matches RTL counter probe).

mac_qk._note: Sim's gemm_log(M=128, K=64, N=128, n_parallel_dpes=16, K_id_phys=2). Physical K_id = 2 (RTL c=128 dual_identity for 2*d_head=128≤c=128), even though sim's cfg.cols=256 would suggest K_id_lat=4. Per-Q-row per-lane fires = N/(W*K_id_phys) = 128/32 = 4. Total = 4 × 16 lanes × 128 Q-rows = 8192. Counter formula: M × ceil(N/(W×K_id_phys)) × W = 8192.

softmax_exp._note: Sim's _run_softmax_exp uses dimm_nonlinear once per row (passes_per_row=1 since cols=128 ≤ cfg.cols=256). Per-lane work = 1 fire × N=128 rows = 128. Scaled by W=16 lanes (dimm_lane[0..15] each have their own sm_exp DPE) = 2048 total fires.

softmax_norm._note: Sim's _run_softmax_norm: 1 norm event per row (the SM_NORMALIZE state entry per lane in the RTL FSM). Per lane × W=16 × N=128 = 2048.

mac_sv._note: Sim's gemm_log(M=128, K=128, N=64, n_parallel_dpes=16, K_id_phys=1, helper_fires_per_row_per_lane=1). Gemm part: 8192 = M × (d/W) × W = 128 × 4 × 16 (= per-Q-row per-lane fires of ws_exp × W × M). Helper part: 2048 = M × W = ws_log scalar fires (1×1 DPE that fires once per Q-row per lane to log-convert the attention vector). Total = 10240.

linear_qkv._note: Sim's _run_linear (AL branch) emits per-arm gemm_dsp counter: M × N × eff_dsp = 128 × 1 × 64 = 8192 fires per arm (each of 64 dsp_macs fires once per input row M, fires_per_lane_per_row=1 for parallel-output FC). 3 arms (Q/K/V) × 8192 = 24,576. Lane count = 3 × 64 = 192 (3 arms × 64 dsp_macs/arm).

mac_qk._note: Sim's gemm_dsp(M=128, K=64, N=128, n_parallel_outputs=W=16, fires_per_lane_per_row=N=128). Each of W=16 lanes scans all N=128 K-rows per Q-row sequentially → 128 fires per lane per Q-row. Total = M × N × W = 128 × 128 × 16 = 262144. Lane count = W=16 (was N=128 before Bug-3 fix; sim's n_parallel_outputs_dimm now uses W from the doc, not N as the placeholder default).

softmax_exp._note: Sim's _run_softmax_exp (AL branch): clb_softmax pulses input ``valid`` once per score during S_LOAD's N=128-cycle streaming. Per lane × per row = N=128 strobes. Across W=16 lanes × 128 rows = 262144 total. Counter probe in TB counts rising edges of clb_softmax.valid (input port) summed across W=16 lanes.

softmax_norm._note: Sim's _run_softmax_norm (AL branch): clb_softmax fires ``valid_n`` once per row at the S_NORM entry edge (= 1 per lane per row). ×W=16 lanes × 128 rows = 2048.

mac_sv._note: Sim's gemm_dsp(M=128, K=128, N=64, n_parallel_outputs=W=16, fires_per_lane_per_row=1). Per lane × per Q-row = 1 fire (FSM cutoff: head's S_DIMM_WAIT advances to S_DIMM_RST on first lane's mac_sv valid_n, soft-resetting all lanes before they can produce additional partial sums). Total = M × 1 × W = 128 × 16 = 2048. Edge-case +32 in RTL accommodated by ±1 edge_slack tolerance for FSM transition timing.
